note: At Add time, series pass as dotted props on the parent chart (series1.name, series1.values, series1.color, series1.categories); this schema is per-series Set/Get after creation. Combo charts (mixed chartType / secondary axis) are unsupported — create separate charts. `lineStyle` is not a key (rejected as UNSUPPORTED — use lineWidth + lineDash).

x.description: scatter/bubble per-series X values (the numeric X domain read from <c:xVal>). Read-only readback key surfaced by Get on scatter/bubble series. X data is supplied at Add time through the chart-level `categories=` list (scatter/bubble map categories onto the X axis), not via a per-series Set. Functional but previously undocumented.

categories.description: per-series category override; range reference only. pptx override: not supported on per-series Set (handler rejects categories on /chart[N]/series[N] paths). Set categories at chart level via `categories=...` instead.
